seoTitle: Moulden vs Mount Johns — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Moulden and Mount Johns. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Moulden vs Mount Johns: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Moulden and Mount Johns.
heading: Moulden vs Mount Johns — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Moulden, Northern Territory and Mount Johns, Northern Territory. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Mount Johns has a lower overall climate risk score (32/100) compared to Moulden (32/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Moulden or Mount Johns safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Moulden has a flood risk score of 58/100, while Mount Johns scores 29/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Moulden scores 28/100 for bushfire risk. Mount Johns scores 61/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Moulden or Mount Johns?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Mount Johns has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.35% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
